evals.name: nodepackages-removed-error
evals.prompt: 我在跑 nixos-rebuild 的时候报错了：error: nodePackages has been removed. Many packages are now available at the top level. 这是 nvim.nix 里用到的。帮我修一下，但别帮我重建系统。
evals.expected_output: Claude identifies nodePackages.prettier in modules/programs/nvim.nix, changes it to prettier, validates with dry-build (EXIT=0), and does NOT run switch.

evals.name: flake-update-version-mismatch
evals.prompt: 我跑了 nix flake update nixpkgs，然后 rebuild 报错说 option 'plugins.X.runtime' does not exist。这是什么问题？怎么修？
evals.expected_output: Claude diagnoses this as a version mismatch: only nixpkgs was updated but home-manager/nixvim are stale. Recommends full 'nix flake update' to align all inputs. Does NOT run switch.

evals.name: remove-heavy-flake-input
evals.prompt: nixy-wallpapers 这个 flake input 更新太慢了，452MB 的仓库我好像只用了一张图。帮我看看是不是可以去掉？
evals.expected_output: Claude greps for nixy-wallpapers usage, finds only cat-leaves.png is used (4 places), recommends vendoring the image into assets/, and offers to make the change. References the 'heavy inputs' pattern from the skill.
